title: Server Actions boundary wiring use cases (no UI components)
description: Add Next.js Server Action modules under src/app/**/actions.ts (or equivalent single documented glob) that are the only server entrypoints mutating persistence: they construct repositories/use case dependencies per request (no mutable globals), invoke application use cases, and return serializable results or domain-safe errors for the client. Include containerized integration tests achieving 100% line coverage on all registered actions.ts files. Do not implement page layout or visual components here.
acceptance: All mutations that change SQLite go through Server Actions in the declared actions.ts glob, not from client-side DB access.
Actions use explicit factory or composition root (per brief) to obtain repository and use cases—no ad-hoc module-level mutable singletons.
Actions expose operations needed for MVP: create todo, list, toggle, update text, delete (aligned with use cases).
Integration tests in containers exercise actions against real SQLite (via compose) and achieve 100% line coverage on the actions modules in scope.
User-visible error mapping hooks exist so frontend can show load/save failures (contract documented; behavior verified in integration where applicable).
No React component implementation in this task beyond minimal server-only helpers if required by Next patterns.
